RCM-RC-101.RCM-RC-101-04: The 'Copy Position' confirmation dialog is open. It shows the body text about copies inheriting the parent's attributes, a 'Number of positions to copy' field with value 1, and a 'Set To Be Recruited' checkbox that is ticked.
